description_text: majsqus Store Item description Feature: brand new and high quality. By ABS material , It does not broken easily, easy install. Super Lightweight & Great Appearance & Stylish Shape. Universal custom fitment; Professional installation is required. After the correct install steps, you will see your vehicle become more perfectly. Fitment: Universal Fitment, Please Measure Your Vehicle Length And Dimensions Prior to Purchasing Specification: rear bumper lip, rear bumper lip diffuser Material: ABS Plastic Color: Glossy Black Type: Flat Placement on Vehicle: Rear Fit: Universal fit Package Included: 4x Rear Bumper Lip Diffuser Shark Fins (Includes screw accessories) Product overview Shipping Policy Payment Description Returns Policy About Us Item will be shipped out within 48 hours upon receipt of your payment. We ship the item through Hong Kong Air mail. Please make sure your address in eBay is correct. If you want to change the address, please give us ebay message right away you make the payment. Combing shipment is not allowed. If you wants to combine all the items together, you should still pay for all of the shipping, insurance and handing fees. Considering the cost of business and easy shipping, usually the item is packed in retail packaging. Normally, the item will arrive in 15-20 days. But sometimes it takes a little bit longer, goes to 20-30 days or more.
